meaning: n.保释,保证金,保证人v.保释,舀水
examples: Can anyone put up bail for you?
He was freed on bail pending an appeal.
She was granted bail with a surety of $500.
His spokeswoman said the UK would not contribute "directly or indirectly" to the eurozone bail-out fund.
Esfandiari's husband said her mother used the deed to her Tehran apartment to post bail.
